spec_match.rationale: The page now contrasts the removed UA cascade with three concrete author recipes for post-Chrome-140 h1 sizing.

interactive.rationale: Segmented radio controls update the rendered document, explanation, CSS snippet, and computed h1-size readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede promises the old browser rule plus three author recipes, and the selector exposes exactly those modes.

edge_cases.rationale: The live document includes section, article, aside, nav, and a deeply nested aside so visitors can compare depth-sensitive behavior.

references.rationale: The concept page links directly to https://chromestatus.com/feature/6192419898654720.

design_system.rationale: The local CSS uses design-system variables, and the segmented control sets foreground and background together.

summary: The page now clears the static-card critique: a semantic segmented radio group switches among the legacy UA comparison and three author recipes, while a live preview and computed-size readout show the rendered effect.
